calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alisa J. Kim, Counselor at Law, Tel. 510.736.6293, for plaintiffs;
Rosemary E. Sheldon, in pro per, Tel. 201.314.7568, for defendant.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court required parties to appear. DEFENDANT'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted in part / denied in part. Defendant shall pay $100. per month, to be deducted from the 2nd pay period. Order signed and mailed to parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489 (302/EHG)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Continued To Jun-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to June 17, 2015 per the agreement of the parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
